[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 01101010 4
3 11000001 3
4 01000000 1
5 11101011 6
6 11110001 5
7 01001100 3

01 10 11100001 4
12 21 01000000 1 match 4
23 32 01001000 2
34 43 01001001 3
45 54 01101110 5
56 65 01001100 3 match 7
67 76 01000001 2
70 07 01000011 3

13 31 01010001 3
24 42 01001100 3 match 7

57 75 01000010 2

71 17 01000001 2

14 41 11100001 4

47 74 01000011 3
50 05 01101010 4 match 2
61 16 11000001 3 match 3
72 27 01000000 1 match 4

04 40 11101011 6 match 5
15 51 01110000 3
26 62 01001100 3 match 7
37 73 01000001 2
